title: Buttery Juicy Romantic Fold German Sausages
description: A Mediterranean-inspired diabetic-friendly dish featuring tenderly cooked German sausages, folded and seasoned with herbs for an elegant twist.

ingredients.name: German Sausages
ingredients.notes: For the best flavor, use a mix of different sausages like spicy or mild for variety.

ingredients.name: Butter
ingredients.notes: Use sweet butter to enhance the Mediterranean flavor.

ingredients.name: Fresh Basil
ingredients.notes: Chopped fresh for added freshness and aroma.

instructions: Arrange sausages on a wire rack placed inside a shallow baking dish. Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle salt, pepper, and basil.
Melt butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Stir in chopped fresh basil until fragrant but not browned.
Pour the melted butter mixture over the sausages and bake for 25 minutes or until juices run clear when poked with a fork.
Remove from oven, let cool slightly before folding them delicately into shapes (e.g., hearts, stars) for presentation.
